pages.text: Miss Sunflower is crying. “A thief just stole my pumpkin pie! Now what will I have for dinner?” she sobs.

blocks.text: Miss Sunflower is crying. “A thief just stole my pumpkin pie! Now what will I have for dinner?” she sobs.

pages.text: “Don’t cry Miss Sunflower. We will find your pumpkin pie,” said Officer Zig. “We will catch that crook!” said Officer Zag.

blocks.text: “Don’t cry Miss Sunflower. We will find your pumpkin pie,” said Officer Zig. “We will catch that crook!” said Officer Zag.

pages.text: “Look! There he goes!” said Officer Zig. “Catch that crook!” said Officer Zag.

blocks.text: “Look! There he goes!” said Officer Zig.
“Catch that crook!” said Officer Zag.

pages.text: “I’m too fast and you’re too slow. You will never catch the pumpkin pie thief!” cried the crook.

pages.text: Officer Zig and Officer Zag did not give up. They ran and ran and ran until… SPLAT! They chased him right into a wall!

pages.text: “Hurray! We caught the crook!” said the cops.

pages.text: Officer Zig and Officer Zag returned the pumpkin pie to Miss Sunflower. “Thank you very much,” said Miss Sunflower. Dinner time!
